examination_log.method: Community-upgrade port: replaced WPL-era unusable Hebrew variant with stronger community fine-tune
examination_log.rationale: Previous Hebrew Lingua was ported from WPL/adarcook/whisper-large-v3-hebrew, audited at 66.9% WER — unusable for production. Replaced with oridror/whisper-large-v3-turbo-hebrew-r1-myd-r1, selected as the most-downloaded community Hebrew Whisper fine-tune on HF. Full WER audit pending; community signal supports usability.

quality_rating.note: Replaced unusable WPL fallback with community whisper-large-v3-turbo Hebrew fine-tune. Quality verification pending.
